text:
There once was a girl named Olive who lived alone in a cute farmhouse. Her favorite thing in the world was apple pies baking in the oven. Sometimes she'd watch the seasons go by and wish she had a boyfriend. Then one winter day she saw a boy across town selling cookies. He had caramel ones. She took him up on it. They got chocolate ones too.

They hung out. She never baked. He baked cookies.

Somehow they became best friends. He'd give her dough at midnight. She'd throw him toast. He came over on weekends. Got her favorite snacks. She'd knit scarves for him.

One snowy Christmas eve. He saw her decorating.

"Merry Christmas!" he yelled.

"Warm!"

They kissed.

Her home was cozy now. She'd had fun with cookies. But she was lonely. One night she dreamed he came back.

Next spring she saw him planting roots. They were together again. She loved his new place.

He smiled. He brought
